item.title: Super Mario Bros. Wonder + Meetup In Bellabel Park Demo Now Available At Switch 2 Kiosks (North America)
item.content:encoded:
Try before you buy

Nintendo has ramped up in-store demos for first-party titles since the launch of the Switch 2, and the latest one available is for Super Mario Bros. Wonder - Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Meetup In Bellabel Park.

These demos for the new experience can be found at select retailers located in the US. This includes Best Buy, GameStop, Target and Walmart.

This follows the release of a Mario Tennis Fever demo on these kiosks last month. Some other playable demos at these same stores allow you to experience Donkey Kong Bananza and Metroid Prime 4: Beyond (this also extends to Canada).

The Switch 2 Edtion and Meetup in Bellabel Park will be released next week on 26th March 2026. We went hands on with the title last month, so if you're curious to find out more about how it plays ahead of launch be sure to check out our preview.

Will you be checking out this demo? How about the full release when it arrives next week? Let us know in the comments.

[source nintendo.com]

Liam is a news writer and reviewer on Nintendo Life. He's been writing about games for more than 15 years and is a lifelong fan of many iconic video game characters.
